transcript.content: 我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the standalone VS Code extension for Codex context status. Earlier detour about Project Assistant linkage is resolved: user required a clear boundary and a standalone extension only, and assistant said the Project Assistant wiring was removed. UI direction already established and should survive as pins: merge duplicated surfaces into one extension, keep the status bar display brief, open a small detail popup on click, support dynamic auto-refresh, and remove live-panel.md as the main entry. Current unresolved work from the latest turn is to delete the codex context meter, show 'Ctx: no workspace' in windows not opened on this repo, include the currently bound workspace path in the tooltip, and ensure two VS Code windows refresh independently per workspace.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same implementation thread, so relation=continue. The next turn still depends on recent raw context about the standalone extension and per-window behavior, especially t10-t11 plus the latest user request. The oldest status/progress turns about earlier UI work and the resolved Project Assistant explanation can leave the raw working set. User boundary and UI preferences are durable and should be preserved as pins.
